# facets

Facet-based metadata extraction and doc rendering pipeline. Each facet
sub-plugin extracts one aspect of plugin metadata (exports, slots, commands,
etc.) from the plugin tree. Sub-plugins live in `plugins/` and expose a
`facet/index.ts` with `export default` conforming to the `Facet` interface
from `@plugins/plugin-meta/plugins/plugin-tree/core`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Facet-based plugin metadata extraction and docgen pipeline
- Exports (core):
  - Values: `facetCollectedDir`, `loadFacets`
